---
layout: default
title: Dynamic Table
permalink: /data-table/
---

# Data from Ruby Function

<div class="table_wrapper">
<h3>Data Table</div>
<table>
  <thead>
    <tr>
      <th>Name</th>
      <th>Age</th>
      <th>City</th>
    </tr>
  </thead>
  <tbody>
    <!-- Loop through the data generated by the Ruby function -->
    {% for row in site.data.my_dynamic_table %}
      <tr>
        <td>{{ row.name }}</td>
        <td>{{ row.age }}</td>
        <td>{{ row.city }}</td>
      </tr>
    {% endfor %}
  </tbody>
</table>
</div>
